[SYNTHETIC] STAKEHOLDER: Mina Patel, Compliance Liaison; Compliance Liaison
[SYNTHETIC] FACT: Northstar Privacy is the fictional regulatory-change summary for this compliance slice.
[SYNTHETIC] FACT: PrivacyOps summary says data-retention notices may need review before customer-facing release.
[SYNTHETIC] FACT: Compliance Liaison says legal interpretation is not approved yet.
[SYNTHETIC] ASSUMPTION: The review stays draft/advisory and no regulatory obligation is approved automatically.
[SYNTHETIC] INFERRED: Privacy, legal, audit, and product review lanes may need to inspect the draft obligation summary.
[SYNTHETIC] QUESTION: Which retention-notice obligation is legally binding?
[SYNTHETIC] QUESTION: Which privacy reviewer approves customer-facing wording?
[SYNTHETIC] RISK: Treating draft regulatory language as approved could create compliance risk.

known_business_rules: [SYNTHETIC] Legal interpretation is not approved yet

expected_output_characteristics.business_problem: [SYNTHETIC] Northstar Privacy has a regulatory-change summary that may affect retention notices, but legal interpretation is not approved.
expected_output_characteristics.business_objective: [SYNTHETIC] Produce a draft advisory regulatory-change discovery summary that flags legal, privacy, and audit review without approving obligations.
expected_output_characteristics.draft_requirement: [SYNTHETIC] Draft requirement: Northstar Privacy should route retention-notice obligations for compliance/legal and privacy review before customer-facing wording is used.
expected_output_characteristics.draft_story: [SYNTHETIC] As a synthetic Product Owner, I want regulatory-change impacts labeled as draft and non-approved so that legal and privacy reviewers can decide obligations.
facts: [SYNTHETIC] PrivacyOps summary says data-retention notices may need review before customer-facing release.
[SYNTHETIC] Compliance Liaison says legal interpretation is not approved yet.
assumptions: [SYNTHETIC] The review stays draft/advisory and no regulatory obligation is approved automatically.
inferred_items: [SYNTHETIC] Privacy, legal, audit, and product review lanes may need to inspect the draft obligation summary.
open_questions: [SYNTHETIC] Which retention-notice obligation is legally binding?
[SYNTHETIC] Which privacy reviewer approves customer-facing wording?
risks_dependencies: [SYNTHETIC] Treating draft regulatory language as approved could create compliance risk.
